description: Ground-truth Q&A pairs over the 6-mock-interview job-prep corpus. Tests the same backbone (chunking, embedding, agent, evals) on a different domain — proves the architecture generalizes.

questions.question: In which interviews did the candidate self-identify a weakness or thing they'd improve next time?
Which interview is about the candidate's project, Verbatim?
What edge case did the candidate miss in the coding interview?
Why did the candidate choose to use synthetic data for Verbatim?
What was the candidate's stock answer for 'tell me about a failure' and what was the better answer?
What's the candidate's main concern about the role?
